content: About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us CuTe App About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us Partner With Us Let's take your Institute Online Take your school entirely online with our zero-headache infrastructure. We provide the complete ecosystem required to run a highly profitable hybrid model. Take your school entirely online with our zero-headache infrastructure. Hardware, Software, and Labs — Managed completely by us. The Complete Institute Upgrade White-Labeled Education Platform Your own branded ERP, LMS, Website & Student/Parent App. Online & Offline Labs Setup Provided Laptops & Tablets for teachers + physical Science & Robotics kits shipped directly to students' homes. Teacher Training & Auto-Recording We train your staff and automate hybrid class recordings to our secure cloud seamlessly. Everything your Institute needs in ONE Dashboard Your CustomWebsite PrivateSocial Media Hybrid ClassScheduling AI SyllabusTracker Automated FeesManagement Digital StudentReports Attendance &Alerts WhatsAppBroadcasting Parent-TeacherChat LibraryDatabase Secure AdminVault Drag & DropDashboards Note: All services are white-labeled to your institute's brand. Physical Labs & Hardware We provide your staff with high-performance Laptops and premium Writing Tablets. Complete online upgradation of on-campus setup of Robotics, Coding, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Logic, Mathematics, and Art Labs. Curriculum fully aligned with NEP-2020 & NCERT standards from 1st to 12th. Automatic recording pipelines so every offline & online class is saved to the student app. Note: All services are customizable. Teacher Training & Camps We upskill your current staff to teach seamlessly in a hybrid environment. Mastery of digital tools (Laptops, Writing Tablets, Smart Dashboards). Fostering Empathetic Learning with Social & Emotional Skills (SEL). Practical Approach towards Subjects Interconnectivity with hands-on learning projects. We also organize Skill Development Workshops & Vacation Camps for your students. Welcome to CuTeES A complete Education System by Curious Team Learning Pvt. Ltd.
